data.body: S5 implemented: oracle.py facade (3 query surfaces refute_absence/applies/scan) exporting unified API from grounding/__init__; closed dimension vocab DIMENSIONS={web_frontend,has_iac,touches_auth,has_migrations,has_tests,smell_generic} v1 owned in oracle.py, registry.py imports it (lazy, cycle-safe) replacing provisional set. New grounding_info read tool wired library(rebar.grounding_info)+CLI(rebar grounding-info, report profile, --output json)+MCP(grounding_info -> GroundingInfoOut). New grounding_info.schema.json registered in OUTPUT_SCHEMAS. Coverage guards updated (CLI_OUTPUT_DRIVERS, MCP CANONICAL/_call_args, help-overview individual set). New test_oracle.py conformance test. docs/grounding.md + refreshed CLAUDE.md Reads + docs/output-schemas.md. GREEN: 195 grounding+coverage+optionality+mcp tests, 149 cli/golden tests, mypy clean. NOT closing per instructions.
